science.title: Astronomers trace winds from actively feeding black holes
science.description: New Delhi: Actively feeding supermassive black holes consume gas and dust from the surrounding galaxies voraciously. The tortured infalling material glows brightly, at times outshining all the stars in the surrounding galaxy, known as Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN). AGN can heat up and expel gas, forming winds that dissipate molecular clouds, preventing the formation of […]
